text: I feel an air of curiosity and possibility in these spaces. The modern meeting room, seen through a glass wall, seems to promise productive collaboration, yet its emptiness echoes with silent anticipation. In the second space, the vibrant R+D exhibit offers innovation and hope – a celebration of human ingenuity. Surrounded by words and visions of the future, I feel inspired but also humbled, reminded of how much remains to be discovered and understood. Being here, I sense the collective striving for knowledge, and I am compelled to both wonder and contribute.
